name: MSI PRO B650-VC WIFI II ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR5-7800+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-A - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3 (B650VCWIFI2)
shortName: MSI PRO B650-VC WIFI II ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0
description: Full-ATX professional motherboard for AM5 with PCIe 4.0, high DDR5 support, and WiFi 6E.
